concerns.detail: Lab-specific descriptors identifying a former student by current employer (top Boston lab), position (scientist), and post-graduation lab attendance behavior, sufficient to de-anonymize the individual
concerns.excerpt: 这个师兄和实验室关系一直很好，现在常驻波士顿某 top lab 做 scientist。毕业以后实验室和导师组织的活动他也经常主动参加

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment attacking a critic's mental state rather than addressing the substance of the criticism
concerns.excerpt: 只能说明说这话的人自己心态有问题
